user.title: Overcast Login
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with Overcast.

qr.title: Overcast QR Login
qr.description:
Scan this QR code with the Overcast iOS app to log in:

`{qr_url}`

Waiting for approval...

error.qr_timeout: QR code login timed out — please try again

play_latest.name: Play Latest
play_latest.description: Play the latest unplayed episode(s) of named podcasts on a media player.

podcasts.name: Podcasts
podcasts.description: List of podcast names to play.

target_player.name: Target Player
target_player.description: Entity ID of the media player to play on.

mark_played.name: Mark Played
mark_played.description: Mark episodes as played in Overcast after playback.

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Playback speed to sync to Overcast (e.g. 1.5). Only affects what Overcast records, not actual player speed.

mark_played.name: Mark Played
mark_played.description: Mark an episode as played in Overcast.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force refresh of Overcast subscription and episode data.
